nasb.text: Does a bird fall into a trap on the ground when there is no bait in it? Does a trap spring up from the earth when it captures nothing at all?

esv.text: Does a bird fall in a snare on the earth, when there is no trap for it? Does a snare spring up from the ground, when it has taken nothing?

cnv.text: 如果沒有餌， 雀鳥怎會掉在地上的網羅中？ 網羅如果沒有捕獲雀鳥， 怎會從地上翻起呢？

ccb.text: 若非设下诱饵， 鸟儿怎会陷入网罗呢？ 若非有什么陷进去， 网罗怎会收起来呢？
